pandoc 
  to: latex
  output-file: EDA_Assignment1.tex

  variables:

    tables: true
  default-image-extension: pdf
  toc: true
  number-sections: true

  classoption:

    - numbers=noendperiod

  author:

          city: Cape Town
          state: Western Cape
          postal-code: 7701
  abstract: |

  keywords:
    - pied babbler *comeback and edit properly
  date: last-modified
  text: |
    \usepackage{lmodern}
    \usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
    \usepackage{amsmath}
    \usepackage{bm}
  journal:
    name: Journal Name
    cite-style: authoryear
